entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 115
entries.excerpt: Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto Your Name give the praise Psalm 113:1. For that grace of the water that gushed from the rock (now that rock was Christ 1 Corinthians 10:4), was not given on the score of works that had gone before, but of His mercy that justifies the ungodly. Romans 4:5 For Christ died for sinners, that men might not seek any glory of their own, but in the Lord's Name. For Your loving mercy, and for Your truth's sake Psalm 113:2. Observe how often these two qualities, loving mercy and truth, are joined together in the holy Scriptures. For in His loving mercy He…
